texts.name: Alatar
texts.biography: Alatar has walked more roads than most know exist, and a few that are better left untrodden. Years beneath the forest canopy sharpened his instincts until broken twigs and bent grass speak to him as clearly as a map to another. Few can rival his eye for the hidden, and fewer still can slip away unseen once Alatar has found their trail.

specialty.description: The hero's scouting radius increases by 1 for every 6 levels.
specialty.name: Scouting
